features: 【Enhanced Illumination For Your Printing Area】Improve your workspace visibility with our innovative built-in LED light strip. It will illuminate your printing process, allowing you to monitor it more effectively. By quickly identifying potential issues such as filament jams, layer adhesion problems, or misalignments, you can address them promptly even in low-light conditions.

【Improve Print Quality with Constant Temperature】Provides a stable and controlled environment for your prints, maintaining a consistent temperature during printing ensures that you produce high-quality prints while avoiding print failures and material wastage. especially when printing 3D filaments such as ABS, ASA, Nylon/PA, and PC. Constant temperature reduces the risk of material clogs and jams, enhancing your printing speed and efficiency.

【Dustproof & Avoids Accidental Touch】Elevate your 3D printing with our robust enclosure, designed for ultimate protection and precision. This sturdy structure shields your printer from dust and debris, ensuring flawless print quality every time. Minimize the risk of accidents by keeping curious kids and pets safely at bay. Enjoy consistent, professional-grade results with enhanced stability and peace of mind.

【Fast Installation and Long-term Use】5 minutes easy installation, quick start and easily disassembled for moving or replacing. Its robust construction ensures stability during operation, minimizing vibrations that could compromise print precision, and can support your long-term use and is not a disposable product.

【Supports Fan Exhaust Kit DIY】An opening has been added to the right side of the cover, which can support the connection of a fan fume extraction kit. Effectively discharge polluted gas inside the 3d printing enclosure, making it safer to use

【Wide Compatibility】Compatible with Creality Ender 3 V3 SE/KE/ Ender 3V2/3V2 Neo/Ender 3S1/3S1 Pro/3S1 Plus/Ender 3Pro/Ender 3/3Neo/Ender5/5Pro/5S1/Neptune 4/Neptune 3pro 4pro/AnkerMake M5/M5C 3D Printer. If your printer size (include spool holder height) is smaller than 29.5×25.6×21.6", it can also be compatible. With its powerful compatibility, it provides the possibility of adapting to a wide range of printers.
